parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  transaction_id: $json.transaction_id,
  amount: $json.amount,
  account_balance: $json.account_balance,
  payment_status: $json.payment_status,
  mock_base_url: $json.mock_base_url,
  channel: $json.channel,
  delay_ms: $json.delay_ms,
  jitter_ms: $json.jitter_ms,
  force_insufficient: $json.force_insufficient,
  force_bank_reject: $json.force_bank_reject,
  force_recaudo_reject: $json.force_recaudo_reject,
  force_tullave_reject: $json.force_tullave_reject,
  force_dian_reject: $json.force_dian_reject,
  force_notify_reject: $json.force_notify_reject
} }}
